description:

title: Seymour man agrees to plead guilty in connection with wire-selling scheme
description:
A Seymour man who is accused of embezzling more than $202,000 from his employer has agreed to plead guilty to one count of felony wire fraud.

title: Maple Leaf Farms names new CFO
description:
Over his nearly 30-year career, Jason Pearce has held a number of financial and business leadership roles, most recently serving as CFO for Geneseo, Illinois-based Wyffels Hybrids.

title: Ballard campaign says it’s closing in on secretary of state ballot signature mark
description:
Greg Ballard’s independent campaign for secretary of state said Tuesday it has submitted at least 35,167 signatures to county clerks in his effort to appear on the ballot under the “Lincoln Party” designation.

title: Sweetwater founder hopes to move forward with $250M racetrack despite land acquisition challenge
description:

title: State’s ratepayer advocate accuses Duke of overcharging customers in appeal to IURC
description:
The state’s top utility customer advocate says Duke Energy Indiana over-collected more than $89 million from its ratepayers and is set to over-collect another $86 million annually.
